name: MoreMenu
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from examples/astryx/.astryx-sandbox/node_modules/@astryxdesign/core/src/MoreMenu/MoreMenu.tsx (react-tsx adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: label
props.description:
Accessible label for the trigger button.
Always used as aria-label (the button is always icon-only).

props.name: isDisabled
props.description: Whether the menu trigger is disabled.

props.name: isMenuOpen
props.description: Controlled open state for the menu.

events.name: openChange
events.description: Callback fired when the menu visibility changes.
